LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS DHRUV SHAH AND MAHESH SHAH'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE AND FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COST- MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY IS GRANTED. THE PROPER COUNTY FOR A CLAIM SEEKING INVOLUNTARY DISSOLUTION OF A CORPORATION IS THE COUNTY WHERE THE CORPORATION'S PRINCIPAL OFFICE IS LOCATED. DEFENDANTS ARE ENTITLED TO HAVE THE ACTION HEARD IN THAT COUNTY EVEN IF OTHER CLAIMS ARE ALLEGED. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR FEES IS DENIED. THERE IS NO INDICATION THAT PLAINTIFF ACTED IN BAD FAITH. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sean DeVries, Tel. 415.312.3084, plaintiff and moving party, appearing on his own behalf.
Brian J. DeAmicis, Esq., of Law Offices of Brian DeAmicis, Tel. 916.440.8833, appearing for defendants and opposing party.

The matter was argued. After hearing, PLAINTIFF SEAN DeVRIES' Motion For Sanctions is Granted. $350.00 in sanctions is awarded to Mr. DeVries against Mr. DeAmicis, payable no later than 6/09/2012. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera CSR # 5153

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Continued To Apr-27-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Sanctions Under Ccp 128.7 And Memo In Support Thereof And Declaration
Off Calendar Oct-13-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF SEAN DEVIRES' MOTION FOR SANCTIONS UNDER CCP 128.7.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Plaintiff's Motion for Sanctions is off calendar. The court issued an order on October 6 granting defendants' motion to change venue. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Application For; Removal Of Directors, Dissolution Of Corporation And Appointment Of Receiver; Request For Judicial Notice;
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
Plaintiff Sean Devries' application for removal of directors, dissolution of corporation and appointment of receiver and request for sanction is off calendar due to the tentative ruling on defendants' motion to change venue. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Change Venue And For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
Defendants Dhruv Shah and Mahesh Shah's motion to change venue and for attorneys fees and cost- Motion for change of venue to Sacramento county is granted. The proper county for a claim seeking involuntary dissolution of a corporation is the county where the corporation's principal office is located. Defendants are entitled to have the action heard in that county even if other claims are alleged. Defendants' request for fees is denied. There is no indication that plaintiff acted in bad faith. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
